title: Giscus UX polish and corelib reader pages on the docs site

source.subject: docs and site: giscus UX, corelib docs, compiler bump

body:
## Outcome

Docs and site: giscus UX, corelib docs, compiler bump.

## Context

- Workstream **docs-site** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`1f5852e`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/1f5852e) — docs and site: giscus UX, corelib docs, compiler bump
